title: Early turnout in Texas Democratic primary outpaces GOP as Election Day kicks off
author: Julia Mueller
fullText: Early turnout in the Texas Democratic primary outpaced the state’s GOP race as voters headed to the polls Tuesday, a signal of intense focus on the state’s marquee Senate race.  Roughly 1.4 million voters cast ballots in the Democratic primary during early voting, which ended Friday, according to unofficial data from the Texas Secretary of…
